Package eu.algites.lib.common.documentation

Class AIcDocumentationTable

java.lang.Object
eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIcDocumentationElement
eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIcDocumentationBlockElement
eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIcDocumentationTable
All Implemented Interfaces:
AIiDocumentationBlockElement, AIiDocumentationElement, AIiDocumentationTable
public class AIcDocumentationTable extends AIcDocumentationBlockElement implements AIiDocumentationTable
Default implementation of AIiDocumentationTable.

See AIiDocumentationTable for the table contract.

  • Method Details

    • getTableTitle

      public String getTableTitle()
      Description copied from interface: AIiDocumentationTable
      Returns the human-readable table title.

      An empty string means that no title is available.

      Specified by:
      getTableTitle in interface AIiDocumentationTable
      Returns:
      table title, or an empty string if no title is available

    • getColumns

      public List<AIiDocumentationTableColumn> getColumns()
      Description copied from interface: AIiDocumentationTable
      Returns table columns in their rendering order.
      Specified by:
      getColumns in interface AIiDocumentationTable
      Returns:
      ordered column list
